items.title: Paper Review is built to act more like a careful technical reviewer than a grammar checker. It…
items.content: Paper Review is built to act more like a careful technical reviewer than a grammar checker. It looks for issues in math, derivations, notation, units, structure, and whether a paper’s claims are actually supported by the results. It also catches inconsistencies across sections, figures, tables, captions, and appendices. The goal is to help authors strengthen technical rigor and correctness before submission. Inside Prism, it runs as a structured workflow and writes its output as an editable LaT…
